text:
advantage of prior planning, sufficient project reserves and sound
                                                                                                                    credit development and preparations, CDB has rationalized the direc-
                                                                                                                    tion and rhythm of extending loans to vigorously support the afford-
                                                                                                                    able housing projects, livelihood undertakings, infrastructure
                                                                                                                    construction, environmental protection, post-disaster reconstruction
                                                                                                                    and independent innovation, given full play to the role of develop-
                                                                                                                    ment-oriented finance in stabilizing the economic fluctuations, and
                                                                                                                    helped steer the economy toward the direction which the macro regu-
                                                                                                                    lation and control expects. Amidst the general trend of the accelerating global economic
                                                                                                                    integration, CDB has actively implemented the “Go Global” strategy
                                                                                                                    and dispatched working groups to over 150 countries to conduct in-
                                                                                                                    depth research on local investment and financing market, seek
                                                                                                                    worldwide business opportunities and vigorously develop interna-
                                                                                                                    tional business. At the end of 2011, CDB reported a balance of for-
                                                                                                                    eign exchange loans of more than US$200 billion, expanded its
                                                                                                                    business to 113 countries, and became China’s largest outbound
                                                                                                                    investment and financing bank.
